_comment: Canonical default content for Bayshore Gifts & Gallery. Baked into the static pages (works with no JS) AND used to seed Netlify Blobs on first run. The admin edits a draft copy of this shape; Publish promotes draft to published; public pages hydrate from published. Editable list items carry an 'id' so they can be added, removed, and reordered. No em dashes or en dashes anywhere in copy.

site.tagline: The bright side of the coast.
site.blurb: A sunny corner of the Coos Bay boardwalk packed with artisan gifts, local art, coastal apparel, handmade jewelry, toys, and souvenirs. Most of it is sustainably sourced from small makers and Oregon artists.
site.address: 264 S Broadway Ave, Coos Bay, OR 97420
site.inventoryNote: Our inventory rotates often, so the exact items in these photos may not always be in stock. There is always something new to find.

hero.eyebrow: Gifts, gallery, and souvenirs on the boardwalk
hero.title: The bright side of the coast.
hero.lead: Bayshore Gifts & Gallery is a sunny corner of the Coos Bay boardwalk packed with artisan gifts, local art, coastal apparel, jewelry, toys, and souvenirs. Most of it is sustainably sourced from small businesses and Oregon makers.
hero.alt: Bayshore Gifts and Gallery entrance with a painted octopus and kelp mural, a scallop shell enter sign, and an open gift shop sign

apparel.title: Coos Bay on your chest
apparel.lead: Soft hoodies and tees printed for the Oregon coast, from a little crabby to clean anchor, turtle, and wave designs, plus artist series socks that give back to working artists and murals. Sea glass, slate, teal, and charcoal, stacked by size and ready for foggy mornings on the bay.

cards.title: Anchor and wave
cards.body: Coos Bay and Oregon Coast pullovers in coastal colors.
cards.alt: Wall of Coos Bay Oregon hoodies in teal, grey, and black with an anchor design

cards.title: A little crabby
cards.body: Turtle, crab, and wave prints with local character.
cards.alt: Coos Bay hoodies including a teal a little crabby design and a sea turtle print

cards.title: Coos Bay and Stay Salty
cards.body: Coos Bay Oregon prints, seahorse and sea life graphics, and Stay Salty tie dye.
cards.alt: Rack of Coos Bay Oregon tees, a seahorse graphic shirt, hoodies, and a Stay Salty tie dye shirt

cards.title: Artist series socks
cards.body: Bold designs, and a piece of every pair supports artists and murals.
cards.alt: Rack of colorful artist series socks under an Art Giveback sign supporting artists and murals

art.title: Walls worth a slow look
art.lead: Stained glass, prints, cards, and gifts from coastal artists fill the shelves, alongside hand blown art glass and coastal decor. A gallery worth a slow look, in a shop wrapped in a hand painted mural.

cards.title: Coastal art and cards
cards.body: Stained glass, prints, and greeting cards.
cards.alt: Wall of greeting cards, stained glass art, and a coastal beach sign

cards.title: Hand blown glass
cards.body: Confetti glass vases in bright coastal colors.
cards.alt: Three hand blown art glass vases with colorful confetti speckles on a glass shelf

cards.title: Sea glass soap and decor
cards.body: Sea glass soaps, driftwood, rope knots, and shells.
cards.alt: Shelf of sea glass soaps, driftwood, rope knots, starfish, and a decorative fishing net

gifts.title: Something to take home
gifts.lead: Sea glass and artist made earrings, rolled glass bead bracelets, small batch candles, botanic soaps and body butter, fair trade pouches sewn from recycled sari silk, Coos Bay mugs and Stay Salty tumblers, retro keychains, enamel pins, and a deep box of dollar fifty buttons. The easy, affordable end of the shop, and the fun one.

cards.title: Sea glass jewelry
cards.body: Necklaces and earrings made from Oregon beach glass.
cards.alt: Display case of sea glass necklaces and earrings on kraft cards

cards.title: Hand made earrings
cards.body: Art print earrings on a rack that changes often.
cards.alt: Wooden rack of colorful hand made art print earrings on cards

cards.title: Rolled bead bracelets
cards.body: Glass seed bead roll on bracelets in every color.
cards.alt: Wooden bowl full of colorful rolled glass seed bead bracelets

cards.title: Pacific Wicks and Lather
cards.body: Small batch candles and handcrafted soaps from a local Oregon maker.
cards.alt: Shelf of Pacific Wicks amber jar candles in Cucumber Mist, Caramel Coffee, and Ancient Amber

cards.title: Soaps and body butter
cards.body: Botanic soaps, body butter, and exfoliating body wash.
cards.alt: Shelves of botanic soaps, body butter tins, and exfoliating body wash bottles

cards.title: Sari fabric pouches
cards.body: Zip pouches and coin purses sewn from recycled sari silk, ethically made.
cards.alt: Basket of colorful zip pouches and drawstring bags sewn from recycled sari fabric

cards.title: Coos Bay mugs
cards.alt: Oak hutch displaying Coos Bay and Stay Salty mugs, tumblers, and coastal drinkware

cards.title: Keychains and buttons
cards.body: Retro Coos Bay keychains, enamel pins, and dollar fifty buttons.
cards.alt: Spinner rack of Coos Bay and Oregon Coast souvenir keychains

toys.title: Bring the kids, bring a kite
toys.body: A whole corner for younger beachgoers: plush sea creatures, science kits, travel games, free kids books, and a ceiling full of rainbow kites built for the coastal wind.
list: Kites and windsocks for the headland
A free book box for little readers
toys.alt: Kids corner with plush sea creatures, books, and rainbow kites hanging overhead

newArrivals.intro: We get fresh finds in all the time. Here is a peek at some of the latest, and the lineup changes often.

about.title: A coastal gift shop on the boardwalk
about.lead: Bayshore Gifts & Gallery keeps the bright side of the coast in one sunny shop, from local art to the souvenir you did not know you needed.
body: We are a family run gift shop and gallery at the south end of the Coos Bay Boardwalk, wrapped in a hand painted octopus and kelp mural. Inside you will find coastal apparel, handmade jewelry, local art, toys and kites, and a whole wall of souvenirs and sundries.

Most of what we carry is sustainably sourced from small businesses and Oregon makers, with minimal plastics and plenty of made in the USA. The artist series socks are part of an Art Giveback program, so a piece of every pair goes back to working artists and community mural projects.
Vintage 101 Marketplace is right next door if you are in the mood for antiques and vintage finds. Come wander both, take your time, and leave with a little of the coast in your bag.
about.alt: Wall of greeting cards, stained glass art, and a coastal beach sign inside Bayshore Gifts and Gallery

visit.title: Find us on the boardwalk
visit.lead: Bayshore Gifts & Gallery sits at the south end of the Coos Bay Boardwalk on South Broadway, with Vintage 101 right next door. Easy parking, a sunny shop to wander, and the bay a short walk away. Open daily, 11:00 am to 5:00 pm.
